items.title: ‘TrapDoor’ malware targets crypto dev tools in supply chain attack
items.summary: Socket says a campaign of malicious packages is aiming to steal crypto and is injecting hidden instructions that hijack popular AI coding assistants.

items.title: NEAR protocol leads AI token rally with a 50% pump: Is $5 NEAR price next?
items.summary: NEAR price surges 50% in a week as AI token momentum, Nvidia optimism and network upgrades fuel bullish sentiment.

items.title: Bitcoin options are coming to Nasdaq. Here's what it means for you.
items.summary: The new offering, pending CFTC approval, aims to democratize seamless crypto risk management

items.title: SEC postpones plan allowing 'innovation exemption' for tokenized stocks: Report
items.summary: The SEC has reportedly delayed releasing a proposal permitting tokenized stock trading after receiving industry concerns.

items.title: Soaring bond prices signal 'structural' shift and Bitcoin 'supercycle': Analyst
items.summary: Fixed-income investors are in a "panic" as government securities, once seen as low-risk, begin to crack, according to BitMEX researcher Shang Wu.

items.title: Tom Lee’s Ethereum portfolio down $7.35B as ETH price outlook worsens
items.summary: ETH’s bearish chart setup points to a 25% drop toward $1,600, risking over $10 billion in paper losses for BitMine in the coming weeks.

items.title: CFTC officials who questioned prediction markets were suspended: NYT
items.summary: A New York Times investigation found that senior CFTC officials who raised concerns about Polymarket, Crypto.com and Gemini were suspended and pushed out.

items.title: Bitcoin is ready to beat stocks and bonds again after underperformance against Wall Street
items.summary: Former Credit Suisse global head of portfolio and Risk Dimensions CIO Mark Connors says bitcoin has broken out of its longest stretch of underperformance in history and is ready to beat stocks, bonds, and gold as inflation stubbornly sticks around.

items.title: Crypto trader sees Hyperliquid, AI tokens leading next altcoin rally
items.summary: Hyperliquid’s surge and renewed interest in AI-focused crypto projects are signaling a broader return of risk appetite in altcoins, says Michael van de Poppe.

items.title: ECB pushes back on euro stablecoin proposals, citing financial stability risks
items.summary: The ECB warned EU finance ministers that expanding euro stablecoin issuance could weaken bank lending and complicate monetary policy.

items.title: Tom Emmer brushes off law enforcement concerns over Clarity Act
items.summary: House Majority Whip Tom Emmer said concerns from law enforcement groups about crypto developer protections are being overstated.

items.title: Congress hits Polymarket and Kalshi with a massive insider trading probe
items.summary: Rep. James Comer is demanding internal records from the prediction market CEOs, warning that government employees could be using classified information to make “huge profits”.

items.title: Hyperliquid is emerging as a challenger to traditional exchanges and prediction markets, says FalconX
items.summary: A new report shows Hyperliquid is rapidly expanding beyond crypto into pre-IPO markets, prediction contracts, and 24/7 asset trading, putting Wall Street giants on high alert.

items.title: Bitcoin trades above $77,000 as oil's 5% slide pushes Asian equities higher
items.summary: Oil’s 5% drop on potential Strait of Hormuz reopening boosted Asian equities and supported crypto sentiment.

items.title: Crypto entrepreneur Chun Wang joins SpaceX mission to Mars
items.summary: Chun Wang, who bankrolled and led a SpaceX flight over Earth’s poles, says he will head to Mars on SpaceX’s first manned mission to the red planet.

items.title: Bitcoin ETFs' 6 day loss streak pushes market closer to net outflows for 2026
items.summary: Dek: US Bitcoin ETF net inflows have shrunk to $536 million so far in 2026, after recording a six-day run of net outflows totalling $1.55 billion.

items.title: ‘Developed ecosystem’ based on crypto has sprung up for AI agents: Report
items.summary: Stablecoins became the default settlement layer for AI agents as crypto payment rails can handle sub-dollar transactions more efficiently, says a report from Keyrock.

items.title: Kalshi backs prediction markets lobby group with former Trump official
items.summary: "We’re not going to be outspent or out-organized by entrenched interests protecting their monopolies," said John Bivona, head of government relations at Kalshi.

items.title: Coinbase does not fear competition from Wall Street, says exchange executive
items.summary: A Coinbase executive called on regulators to implement sensible crypto regulation, while announcing the Stand With Crypto event taking place in over 500 locations worldwide.

items.title: Crypto and the Fed: State of Crypto
items.summary: This past week saw incremental, but potentially important steps.
